project_type: Next.js 15 web app with Firebase Firestore, Google Sheets import feature
verification_instructions: Run npm run build to verify no compilation errors. Manual verification requires checking the import page functionality with real spreadsheet data.
setup_instructions: npm install (already done based on node_modules presence)
environment_constraints: No test framework. Verification is via build success only.
key_patterns: The import/page.js uses a parseRow() function with a 'get' helper that does keyword/fuzzy matching on spreadsheet headers. Education, family, and work data are stored in structured fields (sdNama, sdMasuk, etc for education; keluarga[] array for family; pekerjaan[] array for work). Form Responses 1 stores these as multi-line concatenated text in single cells, while Form Responses 3 has separate columns for each field.
directory_structure: src/app/admin/import/page.js - the import page with parseRow(), fetchFromSheets(), handleFileUpload(), handleImport()
